title: Same Session Resume After Post Tool Capacity
summary: Governed capability for resuming a blocked run on the same session after post-tool model capacity exhaustion.

contract.intent: Preserve expensive post-tool progress by resuming the same session path after capacity cooldown instead of full reruns.
scopeOut: manual shell replay as default recovery path
allowedActions: finalize blocked run with errorCode post_tool_capacity_exhausted
resume existing session before child create
record same-session reuse in run usage/result truth
forbiddenActions: blind full rerun without same-session attempt
hiding blocked-to-resume transition from operator-facing truth
treating post-tool capacity as generic failed without resume metadata
successCriteria: blocked and resume runs are both present
blocked run carries explicit post_tool_capacity_exhausted/deferred metadata
resume run shows same-session reuse and succeeds
failureModes: blocked run lacks deferred cooldown metadata
resume starts fresh session instead of reuse
contract.rollbackPlan: If this capability regresses, revert to the last commit where blocked-to-resume chain is proven and re-verify one bounded pair of runs before further changes.

primitives.title: Blocked Capacity Truth
primitives.description: Blocked run stores explicit post-tool capacity error and deferred resume metadata.

primitives.title: Same Session Resume Success
primitives.description: Resume run proves reused session and non-fresh path.

verify.notes: Pair captured in DAV-131 chain: blocked run deferred to cooldown, scheduler resumed same session and succeeded.
